name: Supplementing Glycine and N-Acetylcysteine (GlyNAC) in Older Adults Improves Glutathione Deficiency, Oxidative Stress, Mitochondrial Dysfunction, Inflammation, Physical Function, and Aging Hallmarks: A Randomized Clinical Trial
summary: A small randomized placebo-controlled trial testing 16 weeks of GlyNAC in older adults, with redox, mitochondrial, inflammatory, endothelial, physical-function, and aging-hallmark endpoints.
venue: The Journals of Gerontology: Series A
